examples: There is great potential and complementarity in the two economies.
The transatlantic deal, by contrast, is all about complementarity.
So we see a virtuous complementarity: more, better spectrum will boost spectrum reuse efficiencies.
Complementarity is far from intuitve, and many of the basic concepts of quantum mechanics are similarly hard to grapple with.
